game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Don’t Starve is an uncompromising wilderness survival game full of science and magic. Enter a strange and unexplored world full of strange creatures, dangers, and surprises. Gather resources to craft items and structures that match your survival style.

Don’t Starve is an uncompromising wilderness survival game full of science and magic.

You play as Wilson, an intrepid Gentleman Scientist who has been trapped by a demon and transported to a mysterious wilderness world. Wilson must learn to exploit his environment and its inhabitants if he ever hopes to escape and find his way back home.

Enter a strange and unexplored world full of strange creatures, dangers, and surprises. Gather resources to craft items and structures that match your survival style. Play your way as you unravel the mysteries of this strange land.

Key Features:

  • Uncompromising Survival & World Exploration:

    No instructions. No help. No hand holding. Start with nothing and craft, hunt, research, farm and fight to survive.

  • Dark and Whimsical Visuals:

    2D characters and odd creatures inhabiting a unique 3D world.

  • Randomly Generated New Worlds:

    Want a new map? No problem! At any time you can generate a new living and breathing world that hates you and wants you to die.
game_info.description: You are Wilson, a scientist trapped in a mysterious wilderness. Survive by gathering resources (berries, wood, stone) and crafting tools to hunt rabbits for meat. Manage your hunger meter - if it reaches zero, you die. At night, stay near your campfire or darkness will consume you. Craft better tools to gather resources faster and survive long enough to find the mysterious portal that leads home. Can you survive 5 full day-night cycles and escape?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Wilson in four directions
Space: Gather resources (berries, wood, stone) or hunt rabbits when nearby
Z: Craft items (axe, pickaxe) when you have enough resources
Shift: Light/add fuel to campfire when standing near it
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic survival mechanics: resource gathering, crafting, and hunger management. Validates that the player can collect berries to sustain hunger and craft basic tools.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move to nearby berry bushes and gather berries consistently. Eat berries to maintain hunger above critical levels. Collect wood and stone to craft an axe, then gather more resources efficiently.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully maintains hunger above zero by gathering and consuming berries. Player crafts at least one tool. Test is successful if player survives for at least 2 full day-night cycles without dying.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully maintains hunger above zero by gathering and consuming berries. Player crafts at least one tool. Test is successful if player survives for at least 2 full day-night cycles without dying.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the win condition: surviving 5 complete day-night cycles and reaching the portal. This validates the full gameplay loop including nighttime survival with campfire management.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Gather resources efficiently during daytime. Craft tools early to speed up gathering. Hunt rabbits for meat when possible. Build and maintain campfire at night by adding wood fuel. Stay near fire during darkness. Approach portal after surviving 5 cycles.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by surviving 5 full day-night cycles and interacting with the portal. Hunger is managed throughout, campfire is used successfully at night, and player demonstrates mastery of all survival mechanics.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing movement mechanics and collision detection. Validates that player can navigate the world properly and cannot pass through solid objects or leave the game boundaries.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move in all four directions systematically. Attempt to walk into trees, rocks, and world boundaries. Verify position updates correctly and collision prevents invalid movement.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player moves smoothly in all directions. Collisions with obstacles prevent movement through solid objects. Player stays within world bounds. Position tracking in logs shows valid coordinate changes.
TEST_3.description: Testing movement mechanics and collision detection. Validates that player can navigate the world properly and cannot pass through solid objects or leave the game boundaries.
TEST_3.strategy: Move in all four directions systematically. Attempt to walk into trees, rocks, and world boundaries. Verify position updates correctly and collision prevents invalid movement.
TEST_3.expected: Player moves smoothly in all directions. Collisions with obstacles prevent movement through solid objects. Player stays within world bounds. Position tracking in logs shows valid coordinate changes.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing hunting and inventory system. Validates rabbit AI, hunting mechanics, and meat collection.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Locate rabbits in the world. Chase and hunt multiple rabbits using Space key. Verify meat is added to inventory. Consume meat to restore hunger.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Rabbits flee when player approaches. Successfully hunting rabbits adds meat to inventory. Consuming meat restores significant hunger. Inventory updates are reflected in UI.
TEST_4.description: Testing hunting and inventory system. Validates rabbit AI, hunting mechanics, and meat collection.
TEST_4.strategy: Locate rabbits in the world. Chase and hunt multiple rabbits using Space key. Verify meat is added to inventory. Consume meat to restore hunger.
TEST_4.expected: Rabbits flee when player approaches. Successfully hunting rabbits adds meat to inventory. Consuming meat restores significant hunger. Inventory updates are reflected in UI.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing nighttime survival mechanics. Validates day-night cycle, darkness danger, and campfire protection.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Gather wood during the day. Wait for night to fall. Test being away from campfire (should take damage). Light campfire and stay near it (should be safe). Add wood to maintain fire.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Player takes damage in darkness when away from lit campfire. Player is safe when near lit campfire. Campfire fuel depletes over time and can be refilled with wood. Day-night cycle progresses correctly.

TEST_5.expected: Player takes damage in darkness when away from lit campfire. Player is safe when near lit campfire. Campfire fuel depletes over time and can be refilled with wood. Day-night cycle progresses correctly.
